metadata.name: stratum_orderbook
metadata.description: State-optimized on-chain order book using Stratum primitives

instructions.name: cancel_order
docs: Maker cancels their own order: verify proof + unset bit

instructions.name: cleanup_expired_orders
docs: Anyone can cleanup expired orders for a reward

instructions.name: cleanup_settlement
docs: Reclaim settlement receipt rent after expiry

instructions.name: create_epoch
docs: Create the next epoch for order batching

instructions.name: create_order_book
docs: Create a new order book for a trading pair

instructions.name: create_order_chunk
docs: Create an order chunk (bitfield) for tracking active orders in an epoch

instructions.name: finalize_epoch
docs: Finalize an epoch — no more orders can be added

instructions.name: initialize_cranker_registry
docs: Initialize a cranker registry for an order book

instructions.name: migrate_epoch
docs: Migrate an existing Epoch account to the new layout.
Only the order book authority can call this.

instructions.name: register_cranker
docs: Register as a cranker by staking SOL

instructions.name: resolve_challenge
docs: Resolve a challenge by re-verifying the root from order data

instructions.name: settle_match
docs: Core matching instruction: verify both proofs, check bitfields,
validate price, transfer tokens, update bitfield, emit event

instructions.name: submit_challenge
docs: Submit a challenge against an epoch root

instructions.name: submit_epoch_root
docs: Cranker submits a computed merkle root for an epoch's orders

instructions.name: submit_epoch_root_decentralized
docs: Submit an epoch root as a staked cranker (decentralized mode)

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized

errors.name: OrderBookInactive
errors.msg: Order book is not active

errors.name: EpochAlreadyFinalized
errors.msg: Epoch is already finalized

errors.name: EpochNotFinalized
errors.msg: Epoch is not finalized

errors.name: InvalidMakerProof
errors.msg: Invalid merkle proof for maker order

errors.name: InvalidTakerProof
errors.msg: Invalid merkle proof for taker order

errors.name: OrderNotActive
errors.msg: Order is not active (already filled or cancelled)

errors.name: PriceConstraintViolated
errors.msg: Price constraint violated: bid price must be >= ask price

errors.name: FillAmountExceeded
errors.msg: Fill amount exceeds order remaining amount

errors.name: ZeroFillAmount
errors.msg: Fill amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: OrderNotExpired
errors.msg: Order has not expired yet

errors.name: SettlementNotExpired
errors.msg: Settlement receipt has not expired yet

errors.name: EpochRootAlreadySubmitted
errors.msg: Epoch root already submitted

errors.name: OrderCountMismatch
errors.msg: Order count mismatch

errors.name: InvalidOrderSide
errors.msg: Invalid order side for this operation

errors.name: NotOrderOwner
errors.msg: Maker is not the order owner

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InvalidTickSize
errors.msg: Invalid tick size

errors.name: InvalidEpochIndex
errors.msg: Invalid epoch index

errors.name: StakeTooLow
errors.msg: Stake amount is below the minimum required

errors.name: InvalidSlashBps
errors.msg: Slash basis points must not exceed 10000

errors.name: InvalidRotationInterval
errors.msg: Rotation interval must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidChallengePeriod
errors.msg: Challenge period must be greater than zero

errors.name: NotCrankersTurn
errors.msg: Not this cranker's turn to submit

errors.name: CrankerNotActive
errors.msg: Cranker is not active

errors.name: AlreadyInCooldown
errors.msg: Cranker is already in unstake cooldown

errors.name: CooldownNotElapsed
errors.msg: Unstake cooldown period has not elapsed

errors.name: ChallengeNotPending
errors.msg: Challenge is not in pending state

errors.name: ChallengeDeadlineExpired
errors.msg: Challenge deadline has passed

errors.name: ChallengeRootSameAsSubmitted
errors.msg: Proposed root must differ from submitted root

types.name: Challenge
docs: A challenge against a submitted epoch root

fields.name: challenged_cranker
docs: The cranker who submitted the disputed root

fields.name: proposed_root
docs: The alternative root proposed by challenger

fields.name: proposed_order_count
docs: Number of orders used to compute proposed root

fields.name: resolved_at
docs: When the challenge was resolved (0 if pending)

fields.name: bond
docs: Challenge bond in lamports (returned if accepted, forfeited if rejected)

types.name: ChallengeStatus
docs: Status of a challenge against a submitted epoch root

types.name: CrankerRegistry
docs: Registry managing staked cranker nodes for decentralized root submission

fields.name: min_stake
docs: Minimum stake required to register as cranker (lamports)

fields.name: challenge_period
docs: Challenge period in seconds after root submission

fields.name: slashed_amount
docs: Total amount slashed from this cranker

fields.name: unstake_requested_at
docs: Unstake cooldown start (0 = not in cooldown)

types.name: Epoch
docs: An epoch containing a batch of orders committed via merkle root

fields.name: merkle_root
docs: Merkle root committing to all orders in this epoch

fields.name: order_count
docs: Number of orders in this epoch

fields.name: is_finalized
docs: Whether this epoch is finalized (no more orders)

fields.name: root_submitted
docs: Whether the merkle root has been submitted

fields.name: submitted_by
docs: Which cranker submitted this root (Pubkey::default() for legacy single-authority)

fields.name: challenge_deadline
docs: Deadline after which epoch can be finalized (0 = no challenge period)

types.name: ExpiryConfig
docs: Standard expiry configuration for accounts that should be cleaned up
- Temporary records that should be removed after some time

fields.name: expires_at
docs: When the record expires (0 = never expires)

fields.name: grace_period
docs: Grace period after expiry before cleanup is allowed (seconds)

fields.name: cleanup_reward
docs: Reward for cleanup crank operator (in lamports)

types.name: HistorySummary
docs: Instead of storing full history, keep aggregates on-chain
and emit detailed events for off-chain indexing

fields.name: last_event_hash
docs: Checksum/hash of last event for verification

types.name: OrderBook
docs: Order book for a trading pair

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority that manages this order book

fields.name: base_mint
docs: Base token mint (the asset being traded)

fields.name: base_vault
docs: Base token vault (holds maker deposits for bids/asks)

fields.name: current_epoch
docs: Current epoch index (incremented when a new epoch is created)

fields.name: total_orders
docs: Total orders ever submitted across all epochs

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Fee in basis points charged on fills

fields.name: is_active
docs: Whether the order book is active

types.name: OrderChunk
docs: Bitfield chunk tracking active/filled status of orders within an epoch.
Wraps Stratum's BitfieldChunk concept but owns its own PDA.
bit set = active order, bit unset = filled/cancelled

fields.name: bits
docs: The actual bits — 256 bytes = 2048 order slots

types.name: OrderLeaf
docs: Order leaf data — not stored on-chain.
Serialized and hashed to create merkle tree leaves.
Must match the TypeScript SDK's serialization exactly.

types.name: SettlementReceipt
docs: Settlement receipt for a completed fill
